---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest more hardware accuracy, a new conformance test, or a performance improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What would this add?**
DMG is a spec-precise DMG (Game Boy) emulator and an EigenScript stress test.
What does this improve — more hardware accuracy (a PPU/timing edge case), a new
conformance test (another Blargg ROM or game), or emulator performance?

**Proposed change**
What hardware behavior it models or which test it adds, and how it'd run.

**Alternatives considered**
Any existing coverage (a Blargg suite, an existing test) that already covers part
of this.

> If this needs a new EigenScript language/runtime primitive, that belongs
> upstream in the [EigenScript repo](https://github.com/InauguralSystems/EigenScript/issues)
> and should be logged as a `GAP-DMG-NNN` in [GAPS.md](../../GAPS.md).
